shell-proxy.description: Token-efficient shell proxy — wf_state, wf_git, wf_step_context, wf_files, wf_read, wf_env. Replaces bash reads with structured cached JSON. Use BEFORE any bash command.

graphify.description: Codebase knowledge graph — graphify_query, graphify_search, graphify_update_node, graphify_snapshot

gitnexus.description: Code intelligence — gitnexus_get_architecture, gitnexus_impact_analysis, gitnexus_detect_changes, gitnexus_find_related

workflow-state.description: Workflow state tracker — workflow_get_state, workflow_advance_step, workflow_request_approval, workflow_add_blocker, workflow_add_decision
